plannedWork.recommendedStack: Bootstrap Mode static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with zero runtime dependencies. package.json is allowed only for local checks if useful. Keep the site Netlify-compatible for a later approved staging step, but do not add Netlify activation, deployment hooks, paid services, forms wired to live services, analytics, tracking scripts, or external APIs.

starterFiles.purpose: Update project purpose, local check commands, safety boundaries, and future deployment approval gates if needed.
Define zero-dependency local scripts for checking the static starter site if needed.
Create the basic construction website homepage with hero, services, proof placeholder copy, and contact CTA sections.
Provide simple responsive styling for the static homepage.
Provide local-only progressive enhancement without tracking, external API calls, or live form submission.

pullRequestFlow: Confirm active approval lock exists for approval-20260704-github-builder-pr.
Confirm boot check and validation pass immediately before execution.
Write only the approved starter files.
Run the local validation plan on the prepared file set before opening the pull request when practical.
Open one pull request from ag-os/starter-construction-website-v1 to main.
Stop after reporting the pull request link.
ciPolling: No CI polling is approved by this package.
If GitHub runs checks automatically after the pull request opens, do not poll or act on them unless the owner separately approves CI status checking.
Do not rerun jobs, edit workflow files, or change repository settings.
mergeRules: No merge is approved by this package.
A later merge requires separate owner approval, validation evidence, CI evidence if applicable, safe-merge review, and a new audit event.
Block merge for any credential, live service, deployment, domain or DNS, paid action, production data, customer data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution concern.
stopConditions: Stop before any GitHub MCP execution without an active approved lock.
Stop if the target repository is not gurnoorbassi/ag-test-construction-website.
Stop if the branch name changes from ag-os/starter-construction-website-v1.
Stop if more than one pull request is needed.
Stop before merge, deployment, Netlify, n8n, domain or DNS, paid action, credential, secret, production data, or customer data handling.
Stop before adding tracking scripts, external paid APIs, wired live forms, or real client data.
Stop before touching Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or the Constitution.
Stop if validation, boot check, or diff review fails.
